title: BMX Plus! — Radical Rick Premier Issue
summary: A January 1980 issue of BMX Plus! identified in the Lititz BMX inventory as the Radical Rick premier issue. The cover date is directly visible in the supplied photograph; the premiere attribution is preserved as the collection’s published identification and remains open to bibliographic verification.
provenance: Current Lititz BMX holding; acquisition details were not supplied in the source record.

title: Radical Rick: The Complete Episodes — Soft-Cover Proof 2 of 8
source_title: Radical Rick Complete Episodes Soft Cover Proof 2 of 8
summary: One of only eight full-color press proofs produced for the cover of Radical Rick: The Complete Episodes. This example, numbered 2 of 8, was used by creator Damian Fulton to verify color accuracy and final finish prior to publication. Printed on 12” x 18” heavy stock, it features a hand-crimped “Certified Radical” gold foil seal and is hand-signed and numbered by Fulton.
provenance: Recorded by Lititz BMX as an online acquisition; public product source retained in metadata.
claim_qualification: Edition, dimensions and production use are sourced from the Lititz BMX inventory and linked creator product record.

title: 35-Year Supercross Damian Fulton Signed Print — 27 of 35
source_title: 35 Year Supercross Damian Fulton Signed Print — Damian Fulton & Bill Ryan 27/35
creator_association: Damian X. Fulton; Supercross BMX / Bill Ryan association
summary: This 35-Year Anniversary Supercross BMX print was created by Radical Rick artist Damian Fulton to celebrate the legacy of Supercross BMX, founded by Bill Ryan. The print is signed by Damian Fulton, connecting BMX racing history with the artwork and visual culture that helped shape the sport. Pieces like this highlight the collaboration between BMX innovators and artists who documented and celebrated the sport’s evolution.
provenance: Source recorded as Damian Fulton in the Lititz BMX inventory.
claim_qualification: The exact signatures visible on the physical print should be verified directly before expanding the signature statement beyond the supplied title.

title: Dirty Fest 3 Original Watercolor Painting
source_title: DIRTY FEST 3 ORIGINAL PAINTING BY DAMIAN FULTON
summary: “Dirty Fest 3” is an original watercolor painting by Radical Rick creator Damian Fulton, created for the Dirty Fest vintage BMX event. The artwork celebrates old-school BMX culture and features numerous legendary riders alongside the Radical Rick character. As a one-of-one original piece of BMX artwork, the painting represents the influence of Fulton’s illustrations on the visual culture of BMX history.
provenance: Source recorded as Damian Fulton in the Lititz BMX inventory.
claim_qualification: People depicted in the artwork are not individually identified in this record unless documented by a supplied source.

title: Radical Rick 2025 New Year’s Drawing — Original 1 of 1
source_title: Radical Rick 2025 New Years Drawing Original 1 of 1
summary: This original Radical Rick New Year’s 2025 drawing was created by BMX artist Damian Fulton, whose Radical Rick comic strip helped define the visual culture of BMX during the 1980s. Fulton traditionally creates a special illustration each year celebrating the arrival of the new year, featuring Radical Rick launching into the future with his signature BMX energy. This hand-signed piece is drawn in Fulton’s classic style and represents the continued legacy of Radical Rick within BMX art and culture.
provenance: Source recorded as Damian Fulton in the Lititz BMX inventory.
claim_qualification: The annual-tradition description is sourced from the inventory record.

title: Radical Rick and Bill Allen Signed Print by Damian Fulton — 57 of 100
source_title: Radical Rick and Bill Allen Signed Print by Damian Fulton 57 of 100
creator_association: Damian X. Fulton; signed by Damian Fulton and Bill Allen (inventory attribution)
summary: Limited edition print illustrated by Radical Rick creator Damian Fulton celebrating two of the most recognizable icons of the 1980s BMX era. The artwork unites Radical Rick with Bill Allen, internationally known for portraying Cru Jones in the 1986 BMX film RAD. Hand-signed by both Fulton and Allen, this piece is numbered 57 of 100 and bridges BMX comic culture with the cinematic legacy of Helltrack.
provenance: Source recorded as Bill Allen in the Lititz BMX inventory.
claim_qualification: Signature attribution and edition number are preserved from the inventory record.

title: Radical Rick Self-Portrait for NoWear BMX — 1 of 45
source_title: Radical Rick Self Portrait 1 of 45 for Nowhere BMX
edition_date: One unique portrait in a group of 45
summary: Original hand-painted mini portrait of Radical Rick created by artist Damian Fulton for the 2024 NoWear BMX Compound fundraiser. Produced to commemorate the 45th anniversary of the character, each portrait is unique and part of a limited run of 45 pieces worldwide. The artwork is hand-signed by Fulton and features the embossed “Certified Radical” seal verifying authenticity.
provenance: Source recorded as Damian Fulton in the Lititz BMX inventory.
claim_qualification: The original source title spells the organization “Nowhere BMX”; the inventory description uses “NoWear BMX Compound.” Both forms are preserved as a known wording discrepancy.

title: Gold Radical Rick Supercross Bobblehead
source_title: Gold Radical Rick Supercross Bobble Head
issue_title: The Cast Steps Off the Page
creator_association: Damian X. Fulton and Supercross BMX / Bill Ryan collaboration
edition_date: One of 45 according to the inventory
summary: A commemorative Radical Rick bobblehead produced for the character’s 45th anniversary through a collaboration between Damian Fulton and Supercross BMX founder Bill Ryan. Finished in gold-plated style resin, only 45 units were produced worldwide. Each example is hand-signed and numbered by Fulton, representing a modern collectible celebrating the enduring influence of Radical Rick within BMX culture.
provenance: Source recorded as Supercross BMX in the Lititz BMX inventory.
claim_qualification: Production quantity, material and signature details are preserved from the inventory and linked product source.

title: #RebuildRadicalRick Campaign
summary: A serialized 2025 Lititz BMX campaign documenting the reconstruction of a 40th Anniversary Radical Rick figure. The campaign archive preserves 19 officially numbered episode positions, 18 verified episodes and one unresolved lost episode without reconstructing missing evidence.
provenance: The complete campaign archive is already preserved in the repository under campaigns/rebuild-radical-rick/.
claim_qualification: The collection does not duplicate the episode archive. It presents the campaign as a connected storyline and directs readers to the canonical campaign record.

title: Cactus Park BMX State Qualifier “1st” Place — Radical Rick Plaque
source_title: Cactus Park BMX State Qualifier “1st” Place - Radical Rick Plaque — First of the Leary Locker purchases
creator_association: Plaque artwork by Damian X. Fulton (inventory attribution)
summary: This 1st Place plaque from a Cactus Park BMX State Qualifier features artwork by Radical Rick creator Damian Fulton. It was the first item acquired from the “Leary Locker” collection, which ultimately led to the discovery of additional artifacts connected to BMX legend Harry Leary. The plaque also inspired a podcast conversation with Fulton and a charity effort benefiting Samaritan’s Purse, where all proceeds were donated.
provenance: Leary Locker; also preserved as a canonical record in Harry’s Room.
claim_qualification: The charity and acquisition-chain statements are preserved from the Lititz BMX inventory.
